Video.summary: Martha shares her love of houseplants. Learn about the popular houseplants and how to take care of them.
Video.title: Amazing Houseplants

Video.summary: Martha explores how best to care for succulents including watering, fertilizing, and repotting.
Video.title: The World of Succulents

Video.summary: Martha visits the annual Orchid Show at the New York Botanical Garden; acclaimed artist Lily Kwong.
Video.title: The Incredible World of Orchids

Video.summary: With over 200 chickens and 20 different breeds, Martha shares her tips for raising and caring for chickens.
Video.title: Hens and Chicks

Video.summary: Martha shows one of the joys of planting bulbs and tubers: having beautiful blooms from spring to winter.
Video.title: Color For All Seasons

Video.summary: Martha joins Chef, restaurateur, and author Jamie Oliver in the kitchen to make easy-to-make menus.
Video.title: One Pot Wonders With Jamie Oliver

Image.alt: One Pot Wonders With Jamie Oliver
One Pot Wonders With Jamie Oliver
One Pot Wonders With Jamie Oliver

Video.summary: Martha makes onions: French onion soup, pearl onions, fried onion rings, pickled onions.
Video.title: Onions

Video.summary: Martha bakes bar cookies: peanut butter and jelly, dark-chocolate spelt brownies, pecan.
Video.title: Bar Cookies

Video.summary: Martha's step-by-step guide for a raised bed vegetable garden: building, preparing the soil, and planting.
Video.title: Martha Builds a Raised Bed Vegetable Garden

Image.alt: Martha Builds a Raised Bed Vegetable Garden
Martha Builds a Raised Bed Vegetable Garden
Martha Builds a Raised Bed Vegetable Garden

Video.summary: Join Martha while she plants a new garden with almost 200 roses.
Video.title: Everything's Coming Up Roses

Video.summary: Martha's woodland gardens, including her azalea grove, burst with the flowers of spring. Plus, bird watching.
Video.title: Azaleas, Hostas, and Wild Birds

Video.summary: Peek inside Martha's gardens past and present! Martha visits her former home, Turkey Hill.
Video.title: Martha's Garden Tours of Turkey Hill and Bedford

Image.alt: Martha's Garden Tours of Turkey Hill and Bedford
Martha's Garden Tours of Turkey Hill and Bedford
Martha's Garden Tours of Turkey Hill and Bedford

Video.summary: Martha makes delicious homemade pizzas with Christian Petroni and Dean Medico.
Video.title: Pizza Perfection: Sicilian and Neapolitan-Style Pizzas

Image.alt: Pizza Perfection: Sicilian and Neapolitan-Style Pizzas
Pizza Perfection: Sicilian and Neapolitan-Style Pizzas
Pizza Perfection: Sicilian and Neapolitan-Style Pizzas

Video.summary: Martha's brunch favorites; Chef Mattos makes omelets with caviar and creme fraiche.
Video.title: Brunch Favorites

Video.summary: Martha visits a local bakery serving the ultimate fresh-baked croissants and sourdough bread.
Video.title: How to Make Croissants and Sourdough Bread

Image.alt: How to Make Croissants and Sourdough Bread
How to Make Croissants and Sourdough Bread
How to Make Croissants and Sourdough Bread

Video.summary: Martha and her niece Sophie visit tea shop Arogya to discover the do's and don'ts of tea.
Video.title: Martha Throws a Tea Party

Video.summary: Martha visits Mast Market to learn about their renowned chocolate.
Video.title: Martha and the Chocolate Factory

Video.summary: Martha demonstrates how to prepare and cook fish.
Video.title: Today's Catch: Fish Recipes for Everyday

Image.alt: Today's Catch: Fish Recipes for Everyday
Today's Catch: Fish Recipes for Everyday
Today's Catch: Fish Recipes for Everyday

Video.summary: Martha and restaurateur Shiva Natarajan make butter chicken, lemon rice, and a tangy yogurt sauce.
Video.title: India: A Tour of Food

Video.summary: Martha and mushroom expert Andrew Carter discuss mushroom varieties; Martha makes delicious mushroom recipes.
Video.title: Magic Mushrooms

Video.summary: Martha, Monica Tran Carden, and Andrew Yu make a mouth-watering variety of homemade dumplings.
Video.title: Easy Homemade Dumplings

Video.summary: Martha samples bagel toppings at NYC staple Barney Greengrass; breakfast sandwiches at PopUp Bagels.
Video.title: The Bagel Show

Video.summary: Martha roasts: roast rack of lamb, salt-roasted sea bass, saffron-roasted chicken wings.
Video.title: Roasting

Video.summary: Martha shows how to properly plant trees; Martha's new maze.
Video.title: Martha's Amazing Maze; How to Grow Trees

Image.alt: Martha's Amazing Maze; How to Grow Trees
Martha's Amazing Maze; How to Grow Trees
Martha's Amazing Maze; How to Grow Trees

Video.summary: Take a tour of Martha's Christmas tree farm; learn how to properly move an established tree.
Video.title: Everything You Need To Know About Conifers

Image.alt: Everything You Need To Know About Conifers
Everything You Need To Know About Conifers
Everything You Need To Know About Conifers

Video.summary: Martha harvests a year-round bounty. Then, how to collect, store, and sow seeds. Plus, Martha's green drink.
Video.title: Inside Martha's Vegetable Greenhouse

Video.summary: Martha bakes tarts and tartlets: apple tarte tatin, chess tart, lemon meringue tartlets.
Video.title: Tarts and Tartlets

Video.summary: Martha bakes breakfast: oven-baked French toast, pea and ham quiche, Dutch baby, strata.
Video.title: Breakfast

Video.summary: Martha bakes basic breads: white, multigrain, rye, Parker House rolls.
Video.title: Basic Breads

Video.summary: Martha bakes old-fashioned fruit desserts: peach cobbler, blueberry crisp, blackberry.
Video.title: Old-Fashioned Fruit Desserts

Video.summary: Martha bakes puddings: Kris Kringle bread, chocolate pots de creme, cranberry, lemon.
Video.title: Puddings

Video.summary: Martha bakes pies: peach crumble, key lime, coconut cream.
Video.title: Pies

Video.summary: Martha prepares grains: sauteed polenta, bulgur tabbouleh, breakfast quinoa, farro salad.
Video.title: Grains

Video.summary: Martha preserves: duck confit, tomato confit, gravlax (cured salmon appetizer).
Video.title: Preserving

Video.summary: Martha and chef Cesare Casella prepare legumes: seven bean salad, Boston baked beans.
Video.title: Legumes

Video.summary: Martha prepares shrimp: cocktail, scampi, traditional shrimp boil, simple grilled shrimp.
Video.title: Shrimp

Video.summary: Martha makes chicken: chicken paillard, chicken pot pie, spatchcocked chicken.
Video.title: Chicken

Video.summary: Series Premiere: Painted Tool Handle, Compost, Farmer's Market
Video.title: Series Premiere

Video.summary: Fishing Trip, Organizing Shoes, Cooking and Scaling Fish, McCoy Pottery
Video.title: Fishing Trip, Cooking Fish, Pottery

Video.summary: Herb Garden, Picnic Sandwiches, Aloe Vera for Burns, Painted Flower Pots
Video.title: Knot Herb Garden, Picnic Sandwich

Video.summary: Ribbons and Bows, Garden Cake, How to Cut Grapefruit, Organizing a Pantry
Video.title: Ribbons and Bows, Peter Rabbit Garden Cake

Video.title: Forcing Hyacinths, Natural Cleansers, Risotto

Video.summary: Bottle Gardening, Wall Painting, Decorative Boxes, Dishwashing Bottles
Video.title: Wall Painting, Decorative Boxes

Video.summary: Painting Porches, Eggs and Country Breakfast, Opening a Paint Can
Video.title: Painting Porches, Country Breakfast

Video.summary: Bare Root Roses, Garden Hose, Daffodil Bundles, Container Garden
Video.title: Bare Root Roses, Container Garden
